ns0:entry.ns0:title: Ataraxy-Labs/sem
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Ataraxy-Labs/sem
Language: rust
Semantic version control => entity-level diffs, blame, and impact analysis on top of git. 26 languages via tree-sitter. Built for coding agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GyulyVGC/sniffnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GyulyVGC/sniffnet
Language: rust
Comfortably monitor your Internet traffic 🕵️‍♂️

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aaif-goose/goose
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aaif-goose/goose
Language: rust
an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chroma-core/chroma
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chroma-core/chroma
Language: rust
Search infrastructure for AI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cjpais/Handy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cjpais/Handy
Language: rust
A free, open source, and extensible speech-to-text application that works completely offline.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloud-hypervisor/cloud-hypervisor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloud-hypervisor/cloud-hypervisor
Language: rust
A Virtual Machine Monitor for modern Cloud workloads. Features include CPU, memory and device hotplug, support for running Windows and Linux guests, device offload with vhost-user and a minimal compact footprint. Written in Rust with a strong focus on security.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cube-js/cube
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cube-js/cube
Language: rust
📊 Cube Core is open-source semantic layer for AI, BI and embedded analytics

ns0:entry.ns0:title: edwardkim/rhwp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/edwardkim/rhwp
Language: rust
아래한글 hwp viewer and editor by rust and wasm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hyperlight-dev/hyperlight
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hyperlight-dev/hyperlight
Language: rust
Hyperlight is a lightweight Virtual Machine Manager (VMM) designed to be embedded within applications. It enables safe execution of untrusted code within micro virtual machines with very low latency and minimal overhead.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kata-containers/kata-containers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kata-containers/kata-containers
Language: rust
Kata Containers is an open source project and community working to build a standard implementation of lightweight Virtual Machines (VMs) that feel and perform like containers, but provide the workload isolation and security advantages of VMs. https://katacontainers.io/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: libkrun/libkrun
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/libkrun/libkrun
Language: rust
A dynamic library providing Virtualization-based process isolation capabilities

ns0:entry.ns0:title: meilisearch/meilisearch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/meilisearch/meilisearch
Language: rust
A lightning-fast search engine API bringing AI-powered hybrid search to your sites and applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/pg_durable
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/pg_durable
Language: rust
PostgreSQL in-database durable execution

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nearai/ironclaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nearai/ironclaw
Language: rust
IronClaw is an Agent OS focused on privacy, security and extensibility

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc
Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: qdrant/qdrant
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/qdrant/qdrant
Language: rust
Qdrant - High-performance, massive-scale Vector Database and Vector Search Engine for the next generation of AI. Also available in the cloud https://cloud.qdrant.io/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rust-lang/rustlings
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rust-lang/rustlings
Language: rust
🦀 Small exercises to get you used to reading and writing Rust code!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/RuView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
Language: rust
π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tree-sitter/tree-sitter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
